About Projects

About






I am a Master of Computer Science student at the University of Illinois Urabana-Champaign, with interests spanning multimodal representation learning, robot learning, and embodied AI. I am currently a reserach intern at Rehg Lab at UIUC. Previously, I obtained





 jiakaic3 [at] illinois [dot] edu ·  @jiaka1chen ·  LinkedIn ·  Resume






Selected Projects




ProCLIP


Product-space geometric representation learning for stronger multimodal alignment across language and vision.




Child Pose Estimation


Vision pipelines for robust child pose and activity understanding in noisy, real-world developmental settings.




Robotic Manipulation


RGB-D perception, grasp detection, and ROS-based planning for manipulation in tabletop and semi-structured tasks.
